CustomField.formula: IF(AND(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Completed'), LastFailedRecordCount__c < 1), IMAGE("/img/msg_icons/confirm16.png",''),'') & IF(AND(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Completed'), LastFailedRecordCount__c > 0), IMAGE("/img/msg_icons/warning16.png",''),'') & IF(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Failed'),IMAGE("/img/msg_icons/error16.png",''),'') & IF(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Not Started'),IMAGE("/resource/talkdesk__assets/mood_icons/mood--neutral.png",''),'') & IF(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Manual'),IMAGE("/resource/talkdesk__assets/mood_icons/mood--neutral.png",''),'') & IF(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Manual Step'),IMAGE("/resource/talkdesk__assets/mood_icons/mood--neutral.png",''),'') & IF(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Not Required'),IMAGE("/resource/talkdesk__assets/mood_icons/mood--na.png",''),'') & IF(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Processing'), IMAGE("https://app.marketo.com/images/icons16/marketo16.png",''),'')& ' ' & IF(ISBLANK(ObjectCode__c), '', HYPERLINK('/' & ObjectCode__c, ObjectLabel__c, ObjectLabel__c) )
CustomField.label: Object
